mainEntity.name: Is voice search SEO different from regular local SEO, or is it basically the same thing?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you are choosing between voice search work and broader local SEO, start with the broader basics first because voice relies on them. A strong Google Business Profile, fast mobile site, good reviews, and local pages help both voice and traditional search.
acceptedAnswer.description: It is mostly the same foundation, but voice search puts more weight on conversational questions and concise answers. Strong local SEO usually improves voice visibility too.
